accurate.why: Correctly describes CRA disapproval of the CFPB small-business-lending (Reg B) rule.

no_hallucinations.why: CRA/CFPB context and 88 Fed. Reg. 35150 citation are accurate.

states_purpose.why: States the resolution nullifies the specified CFPB rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule will have no force or effect (the CRA mechanism).

exceptions_conditions.why: No exceptions or conditions in this one-sentence resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval of the rule.

correct_entities.why: CFPB/Bureau, Reg B, and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act named correctly.

correct_figures.why: 88 Fed. Reg. 35150 and May 31 2023 stated correctly.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
